name: Quantaudio Studio
one_liner: Cinematic devotionals and worship instrumentals shaped by Scripture.
description: Quantaudio Studio composes Bible-anchored, cinematic music designed for prayer, study, and reflection. Sessions are guided by QA prompts—succinct, scriptural cues that keep the listener in the text.
qa_mark_meaning: QA denotes scriptural—Bible-rooted prompts embedded in each work.

brand.logos: Provided upon request for approved usage.

copyright: © Quantaudio Studio. “™” denotes an unregistered mark.
